summary: Tested complete social media connections feature with 120 platforms. All 17 backend tests pass (100%). All 15 frontend UI tests pass (100%). Fixed bulk-connect endpoint to accept proper request body format (changed from raw list to {platform_ids: [...]}). Both backend and frontend now working correctly.

issues: WebSocket 'closed before connection established' warning in console on navigation - expected browser behavior, not a bug

backend_api_tests.test: GET /api/social/platforms returns 120 platforms grouped by 16 categories
Platforms have required fields (id, name, type, description, credentials_required)
GET /api/social/connections with auth returns 120 platforms with status
POST /api/social/credentials/{platform_id} saves credentials and marks connected
POST /api/social/disconnect/{provider} works as alias for delete
POST /api/social/bulk-connect connects multiple platforms at once
POST /api/social/post fails if platform not connected (returns 400)
POST /api/social/post succeeds when platform is connected

frontend_tests.test: Stats bar shows Total (120), Connected, Categories (16), Posts
All 4 tabs visible: Platforms, Overview, Create Post, Posts
Platform cards with Connect buttons visible
Credential modal opens when clicking Connect
Credential modal shows Display Name and required credential fields
Saving credentials marks platform as 'Live' with green badge
Disconnect button removes connection and shows 'Offline' badge
Connect All and Refresh buttons visible
Overview tab shows 'No Platforms Connected' when empty

platforms_endpoint.description: Returns all 120 platforms grouped by 16 categories (social_media, music_streaming, podcast, radio, video_streaming, rights_organization, blockchain, web3_music, nft_marketplace, live_streaming, video_platform, audio_social, model_agency, model_platform, music_licensing, music_data_exchange)

connections_endpoint.description: Returns all 120 platforms with connection status (connected/disconnected) for authenticated user

credentials_crud.save: POST /api/social/credentials/{platform_id} - Saves credentials and marks platform as connected
credentials_crud.get: GET /api/social/credentials/{platform_id} - Returns masked credentials for platform

bulk_connect.description: Connects multiple platforms at once with empty credentials

dashboard_metrics.description: Returns aggregate stats for connected platforms

posts.create: POST /api/social/post - Create post (requires platform to be connected)

frontend_ui.dashboard: Shows 120 platforms grouped by category with Live/Offline status badges
frontend_ui.credential_modal: Dynamically generates input fields based on platform's credentials_required array
frontend_ui.filters: Search, category filter, status filter all working
frontend_ui.tabs: Platforms, Overview, Create Post, Posts tabs all functional

fixes_applied.change: Fixed bulk-connect endpoint to use BulkConnectPayload model with platform_ids field instead of raw list parameter
Updated handleConnectAll to send {platform_ids: allIds} instead of raw array

critical_code_review_comments: All 120 platforms from config/platforms.py are correctly served via /api/social/* endpoints
Frontend correctly uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL for API calls
Credential masking works correctly (first 3 + *** + last 3 chars)
Token field in login response is 'access_token' as documented
All data-testid attributes present for test automation
seed_data_creation: Created test posts and credentials during pytest. All test data cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Social media connections feature is fully working. 120 platforms across 16 categories. Endpoints: GET /api/social/platforms (public), GET /api/social/connections (auth), POST/GET/DELETE /api/social/credentials/{platform_id} (auth), POST /api/social/bulk-connect (auth), GET /api/social/metrics/dashboard (auth), POST /api/social/post (auth), GET /api/social/posts (auth). Frontend at /social shows platform cards with Connect/Disconnect buttons, credential modal, and status filters.
